description: Your Zotero library contains 30 papers from an unstructured bulk import in a collection called 'Unsorted Import', spanning decades of scholarship from the 1930s to the 2020s across social sciences, philosophy, and humanities. Reorganize these papers into a hierarchical structure under a top-level collection named 'Research Archive' with four subcollections: 'Pre-1960', '1960-1999', '2000-2010', and 'Post-2010'. Move all papers from 'Unsorted Import' into the appropriate subcollection based on publication year (papers from 2010 belong in '2000-2010'; papers from 2011
